environment_block_reason: Pass 6 pre-flight: fix for identical-fingerprint root cause applied (doAction(0) fallback removed; content-fingerprint verification added). Will be replaced by a live CI capture on the next run.
at_spi_method: pyatspi DFS traversal; sidebar row activation via named doAction('click'/'activate'/'select') → generateMouseEvent(center,'b1c') → xdotool click; each attempt verified by content fingerprint change on main_stack (pass 6: removed arbitrary doAction(0) fallback)

errors.error: GTK_A11Y not set (default). At-spi-bus-launcher not configured. App did not register in AT-SPI tree.
GTK4 at-spi-bus-launcher working. GTK_A11Y=1 set — unrecognized value. GTK4 printed 'Unrecognized accessibility backend "1"'. AT-SPI registration silently disabled.

GTK_A11Y corrected to 'atspi' (valid GTK4 backend). Run 29641947378 achieved 374 elements — app registers in AT-SPI tree. However all 11 captures were the same onboarding window. Root cause: colima not installed in CI runner → DependencyManager::is_colima_installed() (uses which::which('colima')) returned false → build_onboarding_window() called instead of build_main_window(). No sidebar (sidebar_list) exists in onboarding view.

FIXED: Added scripts/linux/colima_shim.sh — CI-only stub responding to --version/version/status/list/start/stop/delete (exit 0). Updated run_explore.sh and .github/workflows/explore-linux.yml to create /tmp/ci-colima-bin/colima from the shim and prepend to PATH before launching explore_atspi.py. PATH is inherited by the Rust app subprocess so which::which('colima') finds the shim and is_colima_installed() returns true. Updated explore_atspi.py: (1) detect_onboarding_window() guard; (2) improved find_sidebar_listbox(); (3) distinct-surfaces guard.

Run 29642368125: real main window with 11 sidebar labels loads. But pyatspi reports every role as 'unknown' on GTK4/ubuntu-latest. Fixed: fully role-blind DFS strategies (widget_name/accessible-label/child-text/positional). Run 29642368125 captured 10/13 surfaces nonzero. Run 29642873493 (pass 5b): used doAction(0) as positional fallback — captured 87 elements for all 11 surfaces but all 11 fingerprints IDENTICAL. Root cause identified: doAction(0) fired clipboard/focus actions, returned True but did NOT trigger connect_row_selected signal.

FIXED in this commit. Root cause of identical fingerprints: doAction(0) arbitrary-index fallback was falsely accepted because index-0 AT-SPI action is not 'click'/'activate' on GTK4 ListBoxRow — it may be clipboard, focus, or another unrelated action that returns True but does not fire connect_row_selected. Fix: (1) Removed doAction(0) entirely. Only invoke doAction(i) where getName(i).lower() in ('click','activate','select'). (2) Added pyatspi.Registry.generateMouseEvent(cx, cy, 'b1c') as primary mouse fallback. (3) Added xdotool mousemove cx cy click 1 as secondary fallback. (4) Added _get_content_fingerprint(app_acc): DFS-finds main_stack node, collects sorted set of its visible children/grandchildren widget names. After EACH activation attempt, pause surface_pause seconds and compare fp_before vs fp_after — only accept if changed. Dashboard (index 0) skips change check (it IS the initial surface). activate_sidebar_row() now returns (bool, str) for diagnostics.

diagnostic_history.result: 374 elements — but all 11 captures identical onboarding window; colima absent from PATH
pending — colima shim + onboarding guard + improved sidebar locator applied
fixes: scripts/linux/colima_shim.sh created — CI colima stub, satisfies which::which('colima')
run_explore.sh — creates temp bin dir with shim, prepends to PATH, cleans up on EXIT
explore_atspi.py — detect_onboarding_window() guard (fails fast if onboarding shown)
explore_atspi.py — find_sidebar_listbox() improved (widget_name OR label OR role fallback)
explore_atspi.py — distinct-surfaces guard (>= 2 non-empty, >= 2 distinct element counts)

diagnostic_history.result: Real main window loads (11 sidebar labels present). Role-blind strategies. 10/13 nonzero surfaces captured. Positional doAction(0) fallback introduced.
fixes: explore_atspi.py — dump_tree_diagnostic() on first activation miss
explore_atspi.py — name-based fingerprints replace element-count fingerprints

diagnostic_history.result: 87 elements per surface, all 11 fingerprints IDENTICAL. Root cause: doAction(0) returned True for clipboard/focus actions without triggering GTK connect_row_selected signal. Navigation appeared to succeed but stack never changed page.
diagnostic_history.root_cause: doAction(0) arbitrary-index fallback does not fire GTK4 ListBoxRow connect_row_selected. Any AT-SPI action at index 0 that returns True was accepted as navigation even though the stack page never changed.

diagnostic_history.result: pending — doAction(0) removed; named-action-only + generateMouseEvent + xdotool + content fingerprint verification applied
fixes: explore_atspi.py — removed doAction(0) entirely; only invoke named 'click'/'activate'/'select' actions
explore_atspi.py — _get_content_fingerprint(app_acc): DFS-find main_stack, collect child widget names
explore_atspi.py — _get_row_center(row): extract component extents for mouse fallback

explore_atspi.py — activate_sidebar_row: xdotool mousemove cx cy click 1 as secondary fallback
explore_atspi.py — each activation attempt verified by fp_before vs fp_after comparison
explore_atspi.py — Dashboard skips change check (it is the initial/baseline surface)

notes: The linux/ GTK4 app compiles and passes the frontends.yml CI job (linux-gtk4 on ubuntu-latest).
Every interactive widget has widget_name + accessible Property::Label set (linux/src/main.rs and views/).

Diagnostic pass 4 (2026-07-18): root cause was DependencyManager::is_colima_installed() returning false in CI (colima not on PATH), showing onboarding window for all 11 captures. Fix: CI-only colima shim injected on PATH.

Diagnostic pass 5b (2026-07-18): root cause was doAction(0) falsely accepted as navigation. All 11 fingerprints identical (87 elements each). Fix: pass 6 removes doAction(0), adds fingerprint verification.

Diagnostic pass 6 (2026-07-18): removed arbitrary doAction(0), added content fingerprint gate. Named actions only. Three-tier mouse fallback: named doAction → generateMouseEvent → xdotool. Fingerprint computed from main_stack child widget names.
Main window branch: linux/src/main.rs L49-56: if !DependencyManager::is_colima_installed() { build_onboarding_window } else { build_main_window }
